_comment: Actual runtime config is written to /tmp/mcp_runtime.json at startup.
FETCH_ALLOWED_DOMAINS prevents SSRF against internal services.
Secrets injected from env at runtime — never committed.

filesystem-research.description: Read-only access to cloned repos and research scratch space

memory-store.description: Persistent knowledge graph for cross-session vulnerability memory

sequential-thinking.description: Structured chain-of-thought for complex vulnerability analysis

web-search.description: Search for CVEs, exploit PoCs, vendor advisories, and security research
